settings.title: Describe the asset
settings.text: Summarise the asset type, what is included, who it suits, why it may be useful, and what outcome you want from listing it.

settings.title: Prepare details
settings.text: Gather status, asking range, revenue context where relevant, included materials, delivery expectations, and any access limits.

settings.title: Review pathway
settings.text: The listing can then be assessed for fit, presentation, product setup, buyer routing, and next steps.

settings.heading: Submit a business or asset for marketplace review
settings.text: Use this page as the seller intake pathway for business assets, digital properties, systems, content assets, operating assets, or packaged commercial opportunities.

settings.heading: Read before submitting a listing
settings.text: These pages help sellers prepare listing information, understand confidentiality, and review marketplace expectations.
